cdsiSource: MeningococcalB 2-dose/3-dose SCDM (4C and FHbp), Risk 3-dose IR (4C and FHbp)

cases.description: Low-risk MenB SCDM gates at 16y (192mo); high-risk gates at 10y (120mo)
cases.rationale: RESOLVED 2026-04-27: Low-risk MenB now gated to am>=192 per CDSI MeningococcalB SCDM minAge=5840d (16y). Patients 10-15y see no MenB rec unless high-risk. menbStart variable in code now switches based on hr.

cases.description: High-risk MenB at 10y (asplenia/complement/HIV) — IR series starts at 3650d (10y)
cases.rationale: CDSI Risk 3-dose IR D1 minAge=3650d (10y). Code line 462-466 fires for am>=120 + hr. Matches.

cases.description: MenB-4C dose 2: minInt 28d after D1 (4C uses 2-dose routine for low-risk)
cases.rationale: CDSI MenB-4C SCDM D2 minInt 28d. Code line 475 sets minInt: is4C ? 28 : ... — matches.
CDSI MenB-FHbp 2-dose SCDM D2 prefInt 180d (or 120d). Code line 474 sets fhbpD2Min=182 for low-risk (off by 2d, 26-week rounding).

cases.description: High-risk FHbp accelerated: D2 at 1-2mo after D1 (28d), then D3 at 6mo from D1
cases.rationale: CDSI Risk 3-dose IR FHbp D2 minInt 28d (accelerated). Code line 474 sets fhbpD2Min=28 when hr.

cases.description: High-risk MenB revaccination D4: 1y (365d) after primary
cases.rationale: RESOLVED 2026-04-27: high-risk MenB revaccination block added in recommendations.js, parallel to MenACWY high-risk revaccination. CDSI Risk 3-dose IR D4 prefInt=365d. First booster 1y after primary.

cases.description: High-risk MenB ongoing revaccination D5+: every 2y (730d)
cases.rationale: CDSI Risk 3-dose IR D5 prefInt=730d (2y). Revaccination block in code uses 730d for D5+ (after first 1y booster).

summary.notes: MENB-001 resolved by gating low-risk to 16y. MENB-006/007 resolved by adding high-risk revaccination block (1y first, 2y ongoing). Both align with CDSI MeningococcalB Risk IR series.
